chapters.title: Laptop and Passport
chapters.content: Sophie worked remotely as a designer. Her office changed every month—sometimes a café in Lisbon, sometimes a beach in Bali.

chapters.title: Working Anywhere
chapters.content: She learned that freedom also required discipline. Good internet, deadlines, and time zones became part of every destination.

chapters.title: Home Is Flexible
chapters.content: People often asked where she lived. Sophie always smiled and answered, 'Right now? Here.'
